modification.name: Raven Dental — SEO + Frontend + H1/OG Fixes (Combined)
modification.author: Raven Dental Team

operation.add: 'title' => ($this->config->get('config_meta_title') ?: $this->config->get('config_name')),
'site_title' => ($this->config->get('config_meta_title') ?: $this->config->get('config_name')),
$tags['twitter:card'] = array('type' => 'name', 'content' => 'summary_large_image');

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover"> <meta name="theme-color" content="#0d4a6e"> <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes"> <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
<meta property="og:site_name" content="Raven Dental" /> <meta property="og:locale" content="tr_TR" />

operation.search: <input type="text" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="email" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" autocomplete="email" inputmode="email" required />

operation.search: <input type="password" name="password" value="{{ password }}" placeholder="{{ entry_password }}" id="input-password" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="password" name="password" value="{{ password }}" placeholder="{{ entry_password }}" id="input-password" class="form-control" autocomplete="current-password" required />

operation.search: <input type="text" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="email" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" autocomplete="email" inputmode="email" required />

operation.search: <input type="text" name="firstname" value="{{ firstname }}" placeholder="{{ entry_firstname }}" id="input-firstname" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="text" name="firstname" value="{{ firstname }}" placeholder="{{ entry_firstname }}" id="input-firstname" class="form-control" autocomplete="given-name" required />

operation.search: <input type="text" name="lastname" value="{{ lastname }}" placeholder="{{ entry_lastname }}" id="input-lastname" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="text" name="lastname" value="{{ lastname }}" placeholder="{{ entry_lastname }}" id="input-lastname" class="form-control" autocomplete="family-name" required />

operation.search: <input type="email" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="email" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" autocomplete="email" inputmode="email" required />

operation.search: <input type="tel" name="telephone" value="{{ telephone }}" placeholder="{{ entry_telephone }}" id="input-telephone" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="tel" name="telephone" value="{{ telephone }}" placeholder="{{ entry_telephone }}" id="input-telephone" class="form-control" autocomplete="tel" inputmode="tel" />

operation.search: <input type="password" name="password" value="{{ password }}" placeholder="{{ entry_password }}" id="input-password" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="password" name="password" value="{{ password }}" placeholder="{{ entry_password }}" id="input-password" class="form-control" autocomplete="new-password" minlength="4" required />

operation.search: <input type="password" name="confirm" value="{{ confirm }}" placeholder="{{ entry_confirm }}" id="input-confirm" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="password" name="confirm" value="{{ confirm }}" placeholder="{{ entry_confirm }}" id="input-confirm" class="form-control" autocomplete="new-password" minlength="4" required />

operation.search: <input type="text" name="name" value="{{ name }}" id="input-name" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="text" name="name" value="{{ name }}" id="input-name" class="form-control" autocomplete="name" required />

operation.search: <input type="text" name="email" value="{{ email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="email" name="email" value="{{ email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" autocomplete="email" inputmode="email" required />
{{ name }}
{{ name }}
{{ name }}
loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="img-responsive img-first lazyload"/>
loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="img-responsive img-first"/>
loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="img-responsive img-second lazyload"/>
loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="img-responsive img-second"/>

operation.search:
{% for breadcrumb in breadcrumbs %}
  • {{ breadcrumb.text }}
    • {% endfor %}
operation.add:
{% for breadcrumb in breadcrumbs %}
  1. {{ breadcrumb.text }}
    2. {% endfor %}

Aramak istediğiniz alet ne?

Popüler Kategoriler

  • Endodonti Aletleri
  • İmplantoloji Aletleri
  • Cerrahi Aletleri
  • Ortodonti Aletleri
  • Protez Aletleri
  • Periodonti Aletleri
  • El Aletleri
  • Elektronik Cihazlar
